steps.title: Set up the distributive property
steps.content:
To expand $16(x+15)$, we distribute 16 to each term inside the parentheses:

$$16(x+15) = 16 \cdot x + 16 \cdot 15$$

steps.title: Calculate and combine the terms
steps.content:
Evaluate each product:

$$16 \cdot x = 16x\quad\text{and}\quad 16 \cdot 15 = 240$$

Therefore, $16(x+15) = 16x + 240$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
